Malta became a republic, replacing the previous constitutional arrangement.

worthSeeing.title: Valletta UNESCO:
worthSeeing.text: One of the smallest capitals in the world, packed with Baroque palaces.

worthSeeing.title: Prehistoric Temples:
worthSeeing.text: The Hagar Qim and Mnajdra temples predate Stonehenge by 1,000 years.

worthSeeing.title: Crystal Clear Water:
worthSeeing.text: Mediterranean visibility of up to 30 m makes Malta a top diving destination.
